options.responseData: {"message": "Processing started. Check Discord for your docs in ~60 seconds."}

parameters.jsCode:
const url  = $('Extract URL').first().json.url;
const raw  = $json.data || $json.body || $json || '';
const text = typeof raw === 'string' ? raw : JSON.stringify(raw);

const resumeText = "Gadget
Walla Walla, WA | 505.926.1010 | your.email@example.com | https://www.gadget.com

Senior IT Professional — Network Engineering | Systems Administration | Infrastructure | Security

Senior IT professional with 15+ years managing large-scale IT operations including data center migrations and enterprise network design. Experienced across network engineering, systems administration, virtualization, security hardening, and cloud infrastructure. Strong track record of measurable impact: reduced firewall rulesets by 75%, completed a 100-server data center migration in 2 days, and updated 1,200+ routers in 1.5 weeks vs. a 6-month estimate.

Core Competencies: Network Automation & Support | Process Reengineering | Network & Systems Management | Security Management | Server Systems Administration | Systems Availability & Reliability | Vulnerability Management | Patching & Maintenance | Documentation & Reporting | Mentoring & Coaching

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Pursuing continuous learning in Ansible and Kubernetes — self-guided online training programs (2024–Present).

EXPEDITORS INTERNATIONAL — Airway Heights, WA (2025–Present)
Network Engineer
Data Centers Network Engineer responsible for design and implementation of a large enterprise network. Design and integrate computer networks enabling data transfer and communication between different systems, online networks, and databases. Configure, support, and troubleshoot Expeditors' global and local networks.

UMATILLA ELECTRIC COOPERATIVE — Hermiston, OR (2020–2024)
System Administrator
Optimized Windows/Linux servers; administered VMware and Proxmox environments; implemented Docker for scalable application deployment. Monitored and enhanced IT network infrastructure using SolarWinds Orion across routers, switches, firewalls, VPNs, and zero-trust networking. Conducted security assessments and optimized network operations including IP management and VLAN configuration. Coached junior staff.
Key Contributions:
• Reduced firewall rules from 1,600 to 400 — simplified management and measurably improved cybersecurity posture
• Pioneered documentation of complex server room connections across 150 unique points

THE UNIVERSITY OF NEW MEXICO HEALTH SCIENCES CENTER — Albuquerque, NM (2016–2019)
Network Engineer
Co-lead engineer (1 of 2) for the largest employer in Albuquerque — 7,000+ employees, 30,000+ weekly customers across hospital and academic facilities. Oversaw security and operations for 1,000+ networked devices.
Key Contributions:
• Led a 2-day migration of a 12-rack, 100-server data center with minimal downtime
• Designed and implemented Ethernet, VLANs, QoS, and converged Voice & Data networks for telehealth and televideo
• Optimized network using Cisco and Juniper with BGP and DNS configurations
• Spearheaded cybersecurity initiative to harden IT equipment to comply with HIPAA and health security standards
• Directed technical guidance for a team of technicians and analysts

SAIC — Albuquerque, NM (2014–2015)
Computer Infrastructure Specialist
Contracted to Sandia National Laboratories supporting Non-Proliferation nuclear defense initiatives.
Key Contributions:
• Implemented rigorous hardening processes for IT devices supporting national security operations
• Revolutionized documentation practices — network configurations to large-format plotting standard

CRICKET COMMUNICATIONS — Albuquerque, NM (2012–2013)
Security Engineer
Led nationwide project to remediate network vulnerabilities and develop new security policies.
Key Contributions:
• Completed updates across 1,200+ Cisco routers in 1.5 weeks vs. originally scheduled 6 months

NEW MEXICO DEPARTMENT OF INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY — Santa Fe, NM
Network Specialist II
• Scored 97% on CCNA examination

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Applied Science, Information Security Systems | ITT Technical Institute
Bachelor of Applied Science, Electronics/Communications Engineering Technology | ITT Technical Institute
Associate of Applied Science, Computer/Electronics Engineering Technology | ITT Technical Institute

TECHNICAL SKILLS
Operating Systems: Linux (RedHat & CentOS), Windows Server
Virtualization & Containers: VMware, Proxmox, Docker, Kubernetes
Networking: Routers/Switches/Firewalls, VPNs, Zero Trust (Cloudflare), VLANs, BGP, DNS, QoS, SolarWinds Orion, Cisco, Juniper, Palo Alto
Security: Network Security, IPS (TippingPoint), Firewalls (Check Point), RADIUS (Juniper), iptables
Monitoring & Observability: SolarWinds Orion, Grafana, Prometheus (learning)
Automation & DevOps: Ansible (learning), Docker, Kubernetes, basic Python scripting
Data Management & Backup: Tape Backup, Backup Exec, CIFS, NFS, NIS, Samba";

// Strip boilerplate: remove "Similar jobs" section and everything after
let content = text;
const simIdx = content.search(/#{2,3}\s*Similar jobs/i);
if (simIdx > 0) content = content.substring(0, simIdx);

// Remove everything before the first H1 (nav/header junk)
const h1idx = content.search(/
#\s+/);
if (h1idx > 200) content = content.substring(h1idx);

// Trim
content = content.substring(0, 6000).trim();

const prompt = `You are a professional resume writer and career coach helping a senior network/infrastructure engineer apply for a job.

JOB POSTING URL: ${url}

JOB POSTING CONTENT (scraped markdown):
${content}

CANDIDATE BASE RESUME:
${resumeText}

TASK: Extract the job details and generate a complete tailored application package.
Return ONLY valid JSON — no markdown fences, no extra text:

{
  "job": {
    "title": "job title from the posting",
    "company": "company name (if not shown, use the domain name)",
    "location": "city/state or Remote",
    "salary": "salary range as shown, or empty string",
    "is_remote": true or false,
    "role_type": "one of: SRE, Network Engineer, DevOps, Platform Engineer, Cloud Engineer, Infrastructure Engineer, Other",
    "tags": ["up to 8 key technology and skill tags extracted from the posting"]
  },
  "resume_sections": {
    "summary": "2-3 sentence professional summary written specifically for this role at this company",
    "core_competencies": ["10-12 competency phrases most relevant to this specific job — from the candidate's real skills"],
    "experience": [
      {
        "company": "exact company name",
        "title": "exact title held",
        "dates": "date range",
        "bullets": ["2-4 achievement bullets rewritten to lead with skills this job values most — preserve all specific metrics"]
      }
    ],
    "technical_skills": "Technical skills section with technologies most relevant to this role listed first",
    "education": "Bachelor of Applied Science, Information Security Systems | ITT Technical Institute\nBachelor of Applied Science, Electronics/Communications Engineering Technology | ITT Technical Institute\nAssociate of Applied Science, Computer/Electronics Engineering Technology | ITT Technical Institute"
  },
  "cover_letter": "Full 3-4 paragraph cover letter. Paragraph 1: specific hook referencing the company and role. Paragraph 2: 2-3 most relevant experiences with metrics. Paragraph 3: specific value proposition for this role. Paragraph 4: professional close with call to action."
}`;

return [{ json: { url, prompt } }];
